turns.text:
I'm Synthie. I'll help you discover great AI use cases for the first Digital Decision you want to sell. I'll ask you questions one at a time — just talk freely, give me everything you've got, don't worry about length or rambling.

First question:

**Q1 — What industry are you selling into?** Tell me the location, your history with the customer, and as much detail as you have.
